# There and Back Again

> [!tip] 👑 Event · Cost: **1** · Leadership

![[301005.png]]

---

Secrecy 1.
**Response**: After a **_Hobbit_** ally leaves play, search your hand and discard pile for a copy of that ally and put it into play, under any player’s control.
